ground_truth.title: 11 Affordable SEO Services for Small Businesses
ground_truth.author: Clint Fontanella
ground_truth.main_content:
SEO isn't easy – and I should know, it's pretty much my job. I couldn't imagine running a small business while managing my SEO strategy. My resources (and time) would be limited, and I would likely prioritize my business over my website. That's a decision many business owners must make, leaving marketing and sales opportunities on the table as a result.

But what if there was a way to do both? Run your business and optimize your SEO strategy at the same time. That's where an SEO service can be an asset for your company. These agencies improve your website, update your online listings, and maximize your online presence so more customers discover your brand.

In this post, I'll review 11 affordable SEO services for small business owners. We'll discuss what each brand does best, their pros and cons, and how to contact them.

Best Affordable SEO Services for Small Business:

1. Thryv - Best For: Small Business SEO Software. Thryv is a small business platform that also provides expert-level SEO services. Its team helps you build a website, improve your business listings, and create content that grows your presence over time. Thryv will also send you detailed weekly and monthly reports highlighting your performance.

2. PureSEO - Best For: Search Engine Marketing. PureSEO offers SEO, SEM, and CRO services. SEM stands for search engine marketing and includes campaigns like paid ads on Google and social media. CRO stands for conversion rate optimization.

3. Sure Oak - Best For: Backlinking Services. Sure Oak is a small business SEO agency that helps you research your competition and capture more leads. Its team creates a strong SEO strategy for your business and conducts meaningful keyword research that grows your brand online.

4. Intero Digital - Best For: Ecommerce & Online Sales. Intero Digital is a marketing agency offering both national and local SEO services. Local SEO means ranking for searches related to your area, like "best plumber near me" or "best HVAC company in Kansas."

5. Softtrix - Best For: YouTube SEO. Softtrix operates in the U.S., Canada, Australia, and the Middle East. It offers multiple SEO services, including YouTube marketing and Google Business Profile optimization.

6. Small Business SEO - Best For: Flexible Payment Plan. Small Business SEO has over 20 years of experience working with small brands. Rather than signing a lengthy contract, you pay for exactly what you need monthly.

7. MarketKeep - Best For: Website Design. MarketKeep's SEO services are packed into three different plans: Starter, Foundation, and All-In packages.

8. Coalition Technologies - Best For: AI SEO. Coalition Technologies is a digital marketing agency that has worked with brands like Microsoft, PayPal, and Roku.

Local SEO Services for Small Business:

1. Third Marble Marketing - Breaks down its SEO services into three phases: audit and baseline, optimization and review, and recurring check-ins every three months.

2. Thrive Internet Marketing Agency - One of the few solutions on this list for franchises. Helps you establish consistency across your locations and target customer preferences from each demographic.

3. Mark My Words Media - Offers a 2X return on investment guarantee. If it doesn't double your investment, its team will continue working for you for free.

SEO is not a short-term play. To get the most bang for your buck, look for services that provide personalized support for your business.
